mapper.select: SELECT CHAT_NO , C.USER_ID , U.USER_NAME , F.FILE_PATH , B.TITLE , C.JOIN_NO , C.CONTENT , C.CREATE_DATE , C.UPDATED , C.DELETED FROM JOIN_CHAT C LEFT JOIN PLOGUES_USER U ON C.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN USER_FILE F ON C.USER_ID = F.USER_ID LEFT JOIN JOIN_BOARD B ON C.JOIN_NO = B.JOIN_NO WHERE C.JOIN_NO = #{joinNo}
